{{Quote|I am programmed to heal.|Royal med droid|audio=royalhealer.flac|<ref name="Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds">''[[Star Wars: Galactic Battlegrounds]]''</ref>}}
The '''Royal med droid''' was a model of [[Medical droid/Legends|medical droid]] used by the [[Royal Naboo Security Forces/Legends|Royal Naboo Security Forces]]. The healers had feminine voices with a synthesized edge.

One such med droid accompanied Queen [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|Padmé Amidala]] and the Naboo Resistance as they traversed the swamps to meet Boss [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Rugor Nass]] in the [[Gungan Sacred Place/Legends|Gungan Sacred Place]]. The med droid's healing allowed all members of the expedition to survive the occasional encounters with [[OOM-9/Legends|OOM-9's]] battle droid scouts. When working, the Royal med droids were friendly, eager and focused on minimal pain.
